_comment: Known-real resource ids for the sandbox, used by run_module_apis.py to resolve {placeholders} and required query params so live GET calls hit real endpoints instead of 400/404. Scope: pipeline-service. No secrets here.
_safe_writes_note: With --safe-writes the runner ALSO creates a throwaway pipeline (--dummy-id, default 'apidrift_probe') and a throwaway input-set under it. Write ops are forced to target the dummy, never 'pipeline' below. Destructive/execute/update ops are hard-blocked. Cleanup needs DELETE (off-limits), so the dummy persists.
